//: Shared config for dj-tools. This file is optional; tools also read their own tools/*/config.json. Env vars still override everything.
//downloads_only: ID3 should only contain downloaded files/folders. Logs/reports stay in the repo (default) unless DJTOOLS_ARTIFACTS_ROOT is set.
//future_spotify: Used by the macOS app later (not consumed by Python tools today).
//future_telegram: Used by the macOS app later (not consumed by Python tools today).
//future_audio_tools: Used by the macOS app later (ShazamKit + yt-dlp + ffmpeg).
//recognize_tuning: yt-dlp downloads can be HLS/DASH 'fragments' (lots of parts). This controls parallelism; higher is faster but uses more CPU/network.
